cards.desc: Generate dashboard specification. Dependent on scoring methodology.

cards.desc: Deploy club survey once question framework and scoring are locked.

cards.desc: Client-facing summary of Phase 2 methodology and initial findings.

cards.desc: RT3-ACN/nfl-scorecard — grant access so all three team members can contribute.

cards.title: Question Review — V0 questions
cards.desc: Review all 51 questions in the Question Review tool. Flag issues, add comments.

cards.title: Fix 3 pre-pilot issues
cards.desc: DI_03: normalize counts. DI_05: non-response handling. TS_01: concessionaire POS scenario.

cards.title: Deliverable B — Excel scoring framework v1.2

cards.desc: Survey instrument built and validated, ready for pilot deployment.
